# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 131.103 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.1768
  biquad b0=1.00046824403 b1=-1.99765638805 b2=0.99726168848 a1=-1.99765638805 a2=0.997729932514
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 229.248 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 0.8529
  biquad b0=1.00303079234 b1=-1.98508311714 b2=0.982275794267 a1=-1.98508311714 a2=0.985306586608
Filter 3: ON PK Fc 1714.234 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 0.7562
  biquad b0=1.02418811392 b1=-1.87089744734 b2=0.858546855351 a1=-1.87089744734 a2=0.882734969274

  biquad b0=1.00139351941 b1=-1.99281577915 b2=0.991850637745 a1=-1.99281577915 a2=0.993244157155

  biquad b0=1.01344528675 b1=-1.92738071804 b2=0.921371376968 a1=-1.92738071804 a2=0.934816663718
